case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. KIM SARLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200001327) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARLO, KIM $11,505.79 PRINCIPAL, $465.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,970.79, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SARLO, KIM

DECLARATION OF ADDRESS VERIFICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 78477702) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 200001327) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
